input_title: Prod DB throwing 500s, all users affected
input_description: The main database is returning 500 errors for all queries. No users can log in or access any data. Started 10 minutes ago. Revenue impact confirmed.
The copyright year in the footer still says 2024. Needs to be updated to 2025. Very minor, no rush.

input_title: Deploy auth service v2.1 to staging before Friday demo
input_description: The new OAuth2 auth service needs to be deployed to staging before Friday's client demo. Includes a database migration that needs to be run first.

input_title: Add CSV export to analytics dashboard
input_description: Product request: users want to download their analytics data as a CSV file. Should cover the last 30 days. Estimated medium complexity.
Stripe webhook processing is failing ~15% of the time. We are missing payment confirmations. Started 30 minutes ago. Estimated $2k/hr revenue impact.
Search results page 2 and beyond return 0 results. Confirmed bug: the offset calculation is incorrect. Affects all users who search.

input_title: Research GraphQL vs REST for new public API
input_description: We need to decide whether to build the new public API as GraphQL or REST. Requires a technical spike: evaluate both options, write a short report with a recommendation.

input_title: Upgrade Python from 3.10 to 3.12 across all services
input_description: Python 3.10 EOL is approaching. We need to upgrade all backend services to 3.12. This includes updating dependencies and running the full test suite.

input_title: Add dark mode to the dashboard
input_description: Nice-to-have feature request from several users: a dark mode toggle for the main dashboard, with system preference detection.

input_title: XSS vulnerability in user comment field
input_description: Security report: user-submitted comments are not properly sanitized. Malicious scripts can be injected via the comment form. Potential data exposure risk.

input_title: Write integration tests for checkout flow
input_description: We have no end-to-end tests covering add-to-cart through payment confirmation. Need to add integration tests for the full checkout flow.

input_title: Implement rate limiting on public API endpoints
input_description: The public API has no rate limiting. We're seeing abuse from bots hitting our endpoints thousands of times per minute. Need per-IP and per-key limits.
